---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new detector, integration, or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed approach, e.g.:

- New detector: `XyzDetector` that checks for ...
- New integration: Django middleware adapter
- New API: `fw.batch_scan([text1, text2, ...])`

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you considered and why you prefer your proposal.

## Additional Context

References, examples, research links, or mockups.
